name: @chbrain/khai-engine-jealousy
description: khai engine content, the jealousy domain: a rival, real or imagined, threatens a valued bond the persona already holds -- what it takes to appraise the threat, guard the bond, and hold the line.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Jealousy as process: a rival, real or imagined, threatens a valued bond the persona already holds -- the appraisal of the threat, the stance of guarding it, and the vigilance, confrontation, and mate-guarding that follow.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The anchor (process_jealousy.md) declares jealousy as what it is in the room: a rival, real or imagined, inside a bond the persona already holds, not a gap between the persona and a good someone else has. The law makes the three-party threat a thing the scene can carry.
card.issue: The threat, read three ways beneath the bond. One process appraises how real and how close the rival's claim is (threat appraisal); one position names the persona once it has read a threat worth acting on (jealous); one process names what the guarding becomes -- vigilance, confrontation, mate-guarding (guarding). The bond is the anchor; the members are the pressure a rival puts on it.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor, so a threatened bond is read as jealousy wherever it sits. The link: the persona who is guarding links the jealous stance and the process it is in under Projection.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and a real jealous position or jealousy process is linked. Whether the threat actually bears the weight the scene needs is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then place the jealousy: name the bond, the rival, and which process it is in -- still being appraised, or already being guarded. Read it in the vigilance the persona cannot set down, not in the accusation alone.
